buildCommand: npm run build && cp -r data .vercel/output/functions/__server.func/data && mkdir -p .vercel/output/functions/__server.func/node_modules/@resvg/resvg-wasm && cp node_modules/@resvg/resvg-wasm/index_bg.wasm .vercel/output/functions/__server.func/node_modules/@resvg/resvg-wasm/index_bg.wasm
